{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593413252575986457","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错的暖心冒险小故事"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767983872,"group_id":"7529136364055448601","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N++q5qcbs9jxhFjEXvysEYZ2KAJO5/RXBnQ14nHC8hd+","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/265dbbdc448b4f9b858c2c80a6175bc4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794966&x-signature=odvqnEMsZOnJbklC6TpG7FmWXfo%3D","user_id":"1134297400221287","user_name":"诶嘿-囊哒哟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1134297400221287","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7529136364055448601","book_info":{"abstract":"【克苏鲁】【穿越】【无系统】
“人生如逆旅，我亦是行人。”
“人？你是人类吗？”
“我觉得我是。”身为伊斯之伟大种族的李普通回答道。
强得可怕的精神力、意识交换、穿越时空...在绝境之中，这些能力被逐一激发出来。
“可我明明只是一个普通的大学生...”
“如果我不是我...那我到底是谁？”
一次手贱拉窗帘，让在大学享受生活的李普通突然穿越到克苏鲁世界。
怪物！到处都是不可名状的怪物。
绝望崩溃，李普通却意外激发了自身不属于人类的才能。
“巧克力力！”
哪有什么怪物，这分明是个绿毛绿瞳的美少女。
危机四伏的诡异世界，开局捡到的神秘少女。自己到底是什么样的存在，李普通能否认清自己，找到回家的路？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3b897e1c585091a87e2b105e73169216~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"米老师的罐子","author_id":"","book_id":"7529136364055448601","book_name":"诡旅异客：开局娘化深渊造物","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7529136406271115801","read_count":"57","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"169498"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"65","tags":"西方奇幻,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,架空,克苏鲁,穿越,求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o3b897e1c585091a87e2b105e73169216~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386940&x-signature=V%2BIG8QH3G0RpsRSN%2B1zkiFE0VAU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3562018585719528","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"55"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10
